claimBoundary: Kontrol targets reuse Foundry-style property tests for KEVM-backed symbolic execution. They are selected proof targets, not complete wallet verification.

targets.name: initialization-one-shot
targets.property: Initialized accounts cannot be initialized again.

targets.name: immutable-proxy-no-upgrade-selector
targets.property: Immutable proxy deployment does not expose mutable upgrade/admin selectors.

targets.name: account-authority
targets.property: The final validator cannot be removed.

targets.name: frozen-execution
targets.property: Frozen accounts cannot execute ordinary calls.

targets.name: recovery-delay
targets.property: Recovery cannot execute before the configured delay.

targets.name: migration-hash-binding
targets.property: Migration execution must match the scheduled call hash.
